role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The Shares are intended to constitute a simple and cost-effective means of making an investment similar to an investment in platinum. An investment in allocated physical platinum bullion requires expensive and sometimes complicated arrangements in connection with the assay, transportation and warehousing of the metal. It is non-diversified.
